message:
test(proptest): expand proptest_extensions from 14 to 29 tests (wa-1u90p.7.1)

Add serde roundtrips and behavioral properties for 6 new types:
FileAccessScope, CapabilityLevel, SandboxCapabilities, ExtensionManifest,
SandboxViolation. Test CapabilityLevel hierarchy (all levels include
read_pane_output, Full superset of Integration, ReadOnly minimal),
ExtensionManifest effective_capabilities override logic (capability_level
takes precedence), SandboxViolation Display format, and
SandboxCapabilities defaults.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
